---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new script or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is this a new script or an improvement to an existing one?**
New script / Improvement (delete as appropriate)

**Protocol/category**
e.g. HTTP, DNS, SMB, SSL-TLS, DATABASE, FTP, or a new one

**What security check would this perform?**
Describe the misconfiguration or issue it should detect.

**Why is this useful?**
Brief justification (e.g. "commonly missed in production", "OWASP Top 10 related", etc.)

**Risk level (your estimate)**
🔴 Critical / 🟠 High / 🟡 Medium / 🟢 Low

**Are you willing to submit a PR for this?**
Yes / No / Maybe with guidance
